Old Woody.name: 老伍迪 Old Woody
Old Woody.description:
饮用老木头后，掷骰 d100，并应用所列出的效果。如果你并非自愿饮用老木头，你可以尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:20|traits:consumable,morph,primal,transmutation]强韧豁免以抵消该效果。饮用老木头后，你在24小时内暂时免疫进一步饮用老木头的效果。

After drinking Old Woody, roll a d100, and apply the listed effect. If you didn’t willingly drink the Old Woody, you can attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20|traits:consumable,morph,primal,transmutation] save to negate the effect. After drinking Old Woody, you are temporarily immune to the effects of further drinks of Old Woody for 24 hours.

results.1-3: Life Of The Party For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you become charismatic but vapid and unintelligent. You gain a +2 item bonus to Charisma-based skill checks, and a –2 item penalty to Intelligence-based skill checks. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.ZF5cvbrehT0UgJaW]{Effect: Life Of The Party}
results.4-6: That’s Deep, Man For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you stagger slowly as you contemplate the secrets of the universe. You gain a +2 item bonus to Will saves, Perception, and Wisdom-based skill checks, and a –2 item penalty to AC, Reflex saves, and Dexterity-based skill checks. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.HGRP3TWuJnsyoRyp]{Effect: That's Deep, Man}
results.7-9: You Gotta Problem? For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, your muscles bulge but you suffer from a quick temper and poor impulse control. You gain a +2 item bonus to Strength-based attack rolls, Strength-based skill checks, and Strength-based damage rolls, and a –2 item penalty to Will saves, Perception, and Wisdom-based skill checks. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.qtmGI3YNIT4C9glt]{Effect: You Gotta Problem?}
results.10-12: Hard Headed For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you become resilient at the expense of your social skills. You gain 10 temporary Hit Points, a +2 item bonus to Fortitude saves and a –2 item penalty to Charisma-based skill checks. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.NbSnt5tgY3veX5vP]{Effect: Hard Headed}
results.13-15: Hair Of The Dog For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you grow thick fur that protects from cold. You ignore the effects of severe cold, and you gain resistance 5 to cold. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.nDVc77Nshkdhj3uW]{Effect: Hair Of The Dog}
results.16-18: Dragon Scales For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you grow scales all over your body. You gain resistance 7 to physical damage, but each time the resistance prevents damage, it decreases by 1, as the scales flake off. When the resistance reaches 0, the scales are gone and the effect ends. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.YZEtJwCtitwL302g]{Effect: Dragon Scales}
results.19-21: Colorful Concoction For 1 day, your skin color changes to a random hue.
results.22-24: Long In The Tooth For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you grows fangs. You gain a fangs unarmed attack that deals 1d6 piercing damage and has the finesse trait. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.80VpeFg5biDBNE2q]{Effect: Long In The Tooth}
results.25-27: Supersize Me For [[/r 1d20 #minutes]]{1d20 minutes}, you become larger. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}. This is a polymorph effect rather than a morph effect.
results.28-30: Plants On The Ground For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, vegetation grows rapidly along the path you walk. The vegetation is not enough to create difficult terrain, and in most cases, it rapidly withers away after the hour is over. However, if the conditions are right, it’s possible for some of the vegetation to survive.
results.31-33: Putting Down Roots For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you grow roots that burrow into the floor, preventing you from moving. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for the duration of the effect.
results.34-36: I Wood If I Could For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, your skin transforms into wood. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.YWrfKetOqDwVFut7]{Barkskin}.
results.37-39: Love It Or Leaf It For 1 day, your hair turns to leaves. You gain sustenance via photosynthesis and water, rather than food and water.
results.40-42: Overdressed For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, worn items become uncomfortable. You can’t don or wear any worn items during that time. Additionally, you must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:20] save immediately and every 10 minutes during the duration. On a failure, you must remove one of your worn items.
results.43-45: Earworm Supreme For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, a favorite tune repeats in your head, distracting you, providing a –2 item penalty to Perception checks and whenever you attempt an action with the concentrate trait, you must attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:6]; on a failure, the action is disrupted. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.Y60gx7MnjRj0M4gk]{Effect: Earworm Supreme}
results.46-48: Something Fishy In This For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you grow gills and gain the ability to breathe water.
results.49-51: Beer Goggles For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} toward a random person you can see. If your fascination is broken by violence, it returns again after 1 round without violence.
results.52-54: Forgotten Friends For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you have a vivid hallucination that one random person you can see is an important acquaintance from your past.
results.55-57: Encyclopedia Intoxica For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you become trained in one random Lore skill and gain a +3 item bonus to that Lore skill, but you are compelled to talk about that topic incessantly.
results.58-60: Drunken Singer For [[/r 1d4 #Hours]]{1d4 hours}, you become trained in Performance and gain a +2 item bonus to Performance checks to sing. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.H5163mWnzGCQwT3G]{Effect: Drunken Singer}
results.61-63: Do You Speak My Language? For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you are forced to speak a language randomly chosen by the GM instead of any language you know.
results.64-66: Stings The Nostrils For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, your sweat creates severe body odor. A creature that comes within 20 feet of you must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (plus @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for the same duration on a critical failure). On a success, the creature is temporarily immune to body odor for 1 minute, at least under normal circumstances. However, when you enter a stressful situation, such as combat, you begin to sweat more. Creatures who had previously been temporarily immune to your body odor are no longer temporarily immune.
results.67-69: Fizzy Lifting Drinks For [[/r 1d20 #Minutes]]{1d20 minutes}, you float up into the air 10 to 20 feet and hover, but you can’t control how high you are floating and have no way to move laterally, so you just float in place. This is similar to the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fI20AVwOzJMHXRdo]{Levitate} spell except you can’t change your vertical position voluntarily.
results.70-72: What A Lightweight For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, your weight decreases to 1/10th of your normal weight. This doesn’t affect your size or any of your features; you simply become so low in density that you weigh much less. Your gear is unaffected. For a typical Medium creature, this reduces your Bulk, not counting your gear, to 1.
results.73-75: In Vino Veritas For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you can’t lie, with the effects of the cursed item ring of truth. This not only prevents deliberate lies, but also forces you to avoid lies of omission or misleading wording unless you succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:11].
results.76-78: Get Your Motor Running For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, your metabolism is supercharged. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}, and you can only use the action to Strike, Stride, or Step.
results.79-81: The Home Stretch For [[/r 1d20 #minutes]]{1d20 minutes}, all of your limbs elongate and your body becomes elastic. This increases your reach to 10 feet (or 5 feet if you are Tiny). This is a polymorph effect, rather than a morph effect.
results.82-84: I Can Shpeak Jusht Fine For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, your speech is drunkenly muddled, making it difficult to communicate, even though you’re convinced you’re talking normally. If you attempt to use an action with the linguistic trait or to cast a spell with a verbal component, you must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:6] or the action or spell is disrupted. For actions that take more than 1 round, you make the flat check only after you’ve spent the time to attempt the action, as you’re @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.ds8b0pQmSvBglLVB]{Effect: I Can Shpeak Jusht Fine}convinced you were talking normally whether or not you actually were.
results.85-87: Punch Drunk Your fists grow hard as wood. For 1 hour, your fists deal 1d6 bludgeoning damage and lose the nonlethal trait. During that time, your fists also become a +1 striking unarmed attack, causing them to add a +1 item bonus on attack rolls and deal a second damage die of damage. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.L6YTMVkTWTlvfVBc]{Effect: Punch Drunk}
results.88-90: Dizzy For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you can’t tell which direction is which. You’re @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, and whenever you attempt to move, the GM rolls randomly to see which direction you move instead (in an open space, d8 can be used to determine whether you move NW, N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, or W, but in enclosed areas, there may be a different number of options).
results.91-93: Mean Drunk You immediately enter a frenzy, which lasts for 1 minute. During this time, you gain a +4 status bonus to Strength-based damage rolls, but you attack other creatures and significant objects nearby, starting with actually life-threatening foes, moving onto those who angered or annoyed you, and saving those you cherish for last. If you would be forced to attack one of your own possessions, or a friend or close ally, you can attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:20] save to end the frenzy early. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.oknX3OCghpcxwx2f]{Effect: Mean Drunk}
results.94-96: Own Little World For [[/r 10*(1d12) #Minutes]]{1d12 x 10 minutes}, you become deluded into thinking you can’t fail at anything. During that time, you experience an illusory version of reality that is the same as normal except that you succeed at everything you attempt, even if you actually failed. For example, if you fail to Force Open a door, in your mind, you actually opened it, and as everyone else sees you repeatedly walking into a closed door, you imagine yourself going inside (either using images from your memories if you know what the other side looks like or fabricating it entirely if it’s unknown to you). This applies to every check you make, so especially in combat, your opinion of how a battle is going, with you believing you hit with every attack and succeed at every saving throw, might be very different than that of everyone else.
results.97-99: Moment of Greatness Somehow the Old Woody hit you with the perfect blend of effects, so when you think you’re amazing and unstoppable (as normal for alcohol), just this once it’s actually true. For 1 hour, you gain a +1 item bonus to all weapon attack rolls, unarmed attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws. Additionally, once during that time, as a free action, you can bask in your greatness to gain a +1 status bonus to all attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws for 1 minute. @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.EDl7MrcD7SHIGqzh]{Effect: Moment of Greatness (Item Bonus)} @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.VzIf5lWWO2v72T0p]{Effect: Moment of Greatness (Status Bonus)}
results.100-100: 100 Double Whammy Roll twice more and apply both effects, ignoring a result of 100.
